name: Squashed Frogs for Halloween
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan.
2. Add marshmallows and cook over low heat, stirring constantly until melted and mixture is syrupy. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in vanilla and green food coloring until combined.
4. Gradually add corn flakes cereal to the marshmallow mixture, mixing until well coated and bright green.
